title: Benate
description: This is a mod that surrounds a new demigod/boss named Benate. This mod adds a desert dimension and a Forest dimension that have existed for many many years but not thoroughly explored.
body:
The plan for this mod is to add multiple dimensions centering around different bosses. Currently there is a desert dimension with a new boss named Benate. This mod intends to encourage exploration in order to acquire the resources to travel to the new dimensions.
This mod adds a Desert Dimension, a mini-boss (Benate), new armour, new tools. In future a forest dimension will be added which will include poisonous mushrooms and new wood.

New items include:
A new armour set (benalienite)

A new Tool set (benalienite)
